name: Green Beans with Lemon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound haricots verts, or regular green beans
1 teaspoon finely chopped fresh flat-leafed parsley
freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
Trim regular green beans if using. In a large saucepan of boiling salted water, cook beans until crisp-tender (2 minutes for haricots verts or 3 to 4 minutes for regular green beans). Drain in a colander.
In a bowl, toss beans with lemon juice, parsley, lemon zest, and pepper. Season with salt.
